name: openagenda
description: Search, analyze and manage events on OpenAgenda from your assistant.
long_description: Code-mode MCP server for the OpenAgenda v3 API. It exposes just two stable tools — `search_docs` to discover the right API operation, and `execute` to run JavaScript against a ready-to-use `oa` client — so the whole API surface stays reachable without a tool per endpoint. This bundle is a thin launcher: it runs `npx @openagenda/mcp` over stdio and authenticates with an OpenAgenda API key. Prefer the hosted OAuth server? Add `https://mcp.openagenda.com/mcp` as a remote connector instead — no API key needed.

tools.name: search_docs
tools.description: Find the OpenAgenda v3 operations relevant to a question — returns signatures, parameters and examples to call from execute.

tools.name: execute
tools.description: Run JavaScript against the OpenAgenda v3 API through a ready-to-use oa client and return the result.

api_key.title: OpenAgenda API key
api_key.description: Your OpenAgenda API key (a least-privilege/read key is advised). Create one at https://openagenda.com → My account → API keys.
